case_title: REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. YANG XI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI

NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY SERVED MAR-05-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY SERVED MAR-05-2016, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 425 FIRST STREET, #1506, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $510.98 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI
APPLICATION AND DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF AMENDED COURT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585 (D) ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $178.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XI, YANG AKA YANG ZI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT AT ISSUE $5,350.00 RENT, $510.98 COSTS, $5,349.90 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,210.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
